summary: TWO_COLUMN Gibbs phenomenon: Fourier partial sum S_N of square wave overshoots by ~8.95% regardless of N. LEFT axes with BLUE true square wave + YELLOW S_N (N odd-harmonic sum) + ORANGE dashed 1.08949 overshoot limit. ValueTracker N_tr through {1, 3, 8, 20, 40, 60}. RIGHT live N, overshoot percent.
